meta.title: EcoRoute AI Operations Mood Board
meta.summary: Single-image visual references for a black, green, and blue smart-city waste-routing dashboard.
meta.brief: EcoRoute AI smart waste-routing dashboard, Astana demo. Make the Streamlit demo feel like a polished city operations product instead of a plain white report.

signals.goal: Polished city operations product, not a plain white report

items.title: Operations Map Wall
items.caption: Dark municipal control room with blue routing lines and green service signals.
items.motif: large city map, glowing route, data cards
items.palette: black base with electric blue paths and ecological green points
items.prompt: Single cinematic visual reference image of a modern smart-city operations room focused on a large dark map wall, glowing blue route lines and green waste-bin status points, black glass desks, subtle municipal control center atmosphere, premium product-dashboard lighting, no readable text, no logos, no collage, no split panels.

style.label: More cinematic
style.description: Push deeper shadows and stronger command-center drama.
style.promptHint: increase cinematic contrast, darker room, brighter blue route glow

style.label: More product UI
style.description: Make the map wall feel closer to a polished SaaS dashboard.
style.promptHint: cleaner dashboard surfaces, crisp glass UI panels, less room detail

palette.label: Blue dominant
palette.promptHint: make blue route lighting dominant, green only as status accents

palette.label: Green dominant
palette.description: Make ecology and collection priority lead.
palette.promptHint: make green bin signals dominant, blue route line secondary

scene.label: Closer dashboard
scene.description: Crop into the map and UI surface.
scene.promptHint: closer crop on dark map wall and data panels

props.label: Fleet console
props.description: Bring truck routing hardware into the scene.
props.promptHint: add subtle control console and dispatch workstation

props.label: Minimal props
props.promptHint: remove extra physical props, emphasize clean digital surfaces

character.label: Planner silhouette
character.description: Add human scale without stealing focus.
character.promptHint: one subtle operator silhouette viewing the map

format.label: Hero wide
format.description: Useful for the top dashboard mood.

format.label: Panel crop
format.promptHint: dashboard panel crop, strong central route

items.title: Dark Dashboard Closeup
items.caption: Glassmorphism-like black UI cards with green and blue data contrast.
items.motif: dark analytics cards, luminous chart edges
items.palette: near-black surfaces, blue grids, green positive metrics
items.prompt: Single visual reference image of a premium dark analytics dashboard closeup, black layered panels, blue chart gridlines, green route savings indicators, crisp luminous UI surfaces, no readable text, no logos, no collage, no split panels, high contrast professional civic-tech style.

style.label: Sharper UI
style.promptHint: sharper UI cards, crisp borders, exact grid alignment

style.label: Softer glow
style.promptHint: soft glow, subtle depth, fewer hard edges

palette.label: Cooler blue
palette.promptHint: cool blue dominance with green metric accents

palette.label: Eco pulse
palette.promptHint: green glow on savings and priority states

scene.label: Chart cluster
scene.promptHint: multiple clean chart panels in dark UI

scene.label: Metric wall
scene.promptHint: large metric cards with compact chart hints

props.label: No hardware
props.promptHint: only digital UI, no physical device

props.label: On tablet
props.promptHint: dashboard shown on a sleek black tablet

character.label: Operator hand
character.promptHint: subtle hand near touch interface, no identity detail

format.label: Macro UI
format.promptHint: macro close-up of UI cards and charts

items.title: Night Route Network
items.caption: A city-at-night route pattern for the map treatment.
items.motif: night map, connected nodes, optimized path
items.palette: black city grid, blue route line, green collection points
items.prompt: Single top-down visual reference image of a dark city street grid at night, one optimized glowing blue route connecting green collection nodes, subtle depth and clean cartographic texture, smart-city routing mood, no readable street names, no labels, no logos, no collage, no split panels.

style.label: Cleaner map
style.promptHint: clean cartographic style, less cinematic grain

style.label: More dramatic
style.promptHint: stronger night glow, deeper black background

palette.label: Blue path
palette.promptHint: brighter blue route with restrained green nodes

palette.label: Green nodes
palette.promptHint: brighter green collection nodes with dark blue path

scene.label: Spacious district
scene.promptHint: more open district map with fewer road lines

props.label: No vehicles
props.promptHint: no visible trucks or cars

props.label: Tiny fleet hint
props.promptHint: one tiny abstract truck icon shape without text

items.caption: Dense but readable KPI cards with civic-tech confidence.

items.palette: black cards, green positive deltas, blue analytics accents

style.label: Executive
style.promptHint: clean executive dashboard, larger metric cards

style.label: Technical
style.promptHint: denser telemetry cards and technical grid

palette.label: Black-heavy
palette.promptHint: mostly black panels with minimal neon accents

props.label: None
props.promptHint: no props, only UI

props.label: Subtle map trace
props.promptHint: small route-map trace behind metric cards
